calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,220p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court ca11 --docket 68252091 --event evt-motion-proceed-ifp && rg --files data/cases/ca11/68252091 . | rg '(68252091|evt-motion-proceed-ifp|record/(context|documents)|snapshot)' | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court ca11 --docket 68252091 --event evt-motion-proceed-ifp\nrg --files data . | rg '(68252091|evt-motion-proceed-ifp|record/(context|documents)|snapshot)' | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"pwd\nrg --files -uu | rg '(^|/)(record|snapshots?|documents?)/|context\\.json$|documents\\.json$' | head -300\nfind /tmp -maxdepth 5 -type f 2>/dev/null | rg '(context\\.json|documents\\.json|snapshot|68252091|evt-motion-proceed-ifp)' | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-motion-proceed-ifp/event.yaml
sed -n '1,400p' data/cases/ca11/68252091/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json
rg --files -uu data/cases/ca11/68252091/record/documents 2>/dev/null || true
sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca11/68252091/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help\nrg -n \"proceed IFP|in forma pauperis|motion.*disposition|Modern discretionary|by disposition\" metrics/statpack.md docs/cli.md | head -120","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court ca11 --era 2020s --limit 20 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|docket|recap|legal/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const [a,b] = await Promise.all([
  tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:["ca11"],q:"mandamus \"in forma pauperis\" frivolous",filed_before:"2024-02-01",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet","status"],num_results:10}),
  tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"Angela DeBose\"",filed_before:"2024-02-01",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","absolute_url","snippet","status"],num_results:10})
]); text(JSON.stringify({gene
const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -l -i 'proceed IFP|in forma pauperis' data/cases --glob 'event.yaml' | head -100\nfind data/cases -path '*/events/evt-motion-proceed-ifp/event.yaml' -print | head -100","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output);
const s = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_schema({endpoint_id:"dockets"}); text(s);
const s = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_schema({endpoint_id:"docket-entries"}); text(s);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__call_endpoint({endpoint_id:"dockets",num_results:10,query:{docket_number:"4:22-cv-00439",court:"flnd",fields:["id","case_name","case_name_full","court_id","docket_number","date_filed","date_terminated","date_last_filing","assigned_to_str","docket_entries"]}}); text(r);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__call_endpoint({endpoint_id:"dockets",num_results:10,query:{docket_number:"4:22-cv-00439",court:"flnd",fields:["id","case_name","case_name_full","court_id","docket_number","date_filed","date_terminated","date_last_filing","assigned_to_str","absolute_url"]}}); text(r);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg --files -uu data/cases/ca11/68252091/record | sort\ndate -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ\ntest -e data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-motion-proceed-ifp/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z && find data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-motion-proceed-ifp/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -print || true","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"mkdir -p data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-motion-proceed-ifp/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output);

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-motion-proceed-ifp/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z/prediction.json
+{
+  "case_id": "ca11/68252091",
+  "confidence": 0.32,
+  "created_at": "2026-07-11T09:20:19Z",
+  "engine": "codex",
+  "event_id": "evt-motion-proceed-ifp",
+  "granted": 1,
+  "input_snapshot": "data/cases/ca11/68252091/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json",
+  \

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-motion-proceed-ifp/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z/tooling.json
@@
-  "schema_version": "1.0",
-  "tool_manifest": [
-    "courtlistener"
-  ],
+  "schema_version": "1.0",
*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data\ngit status --short\nfind data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-motion-proceed-ifp/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);
